title: Process Engineer Vacancy at NHPC Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at NHPC Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, NHPC Holdings Services in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About NHPC Holdings Services:
NHPC Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHPC Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
